message:
test(unit): expand treap.rs inline tests from 16 to 37 (+21) (ft-3w1zd)

Cover empty tree ops, remove-sole/all, ascending/descending insert,
kth/rank inverse, interleaved insert/remove, seed reproducibility,
clone independence, size consistency, serde query preservation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
